---
title: "Real Estate Insights"
image: '/static/images/profile.jpg'
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinicius-oike-993826a9/"
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: "https://github.com/viniciusoike"
comments: false
toc: false
---

## Vinicius Oike Reginatto

I'm an economist and data scientist based in São Paulo, Brazil. I write
about economics, urban analytics, and the real estate market — mostly
through data visualization with R.

[Read the blog](blog.qmd) · [Browse the chart gallery](gallery.qmd) ·
[Learn ggplot2](tutorial-ggplot2.qmd) · [About me](aboutme.qmd)
